title: Malaysian Curry Feta Fritters
description: A unique twist on traditional fritters, these bite-sized treats combine the creamy tang of feta with the bold flavors of Malaysian curry.
instructions: 1. In a large mixing bowl, combine crumbled feta cheese, minced pungent, melted goey, and curry paste. Mix well.
2. Gradually add flour to the bowl, mixing until a dough forms.
3. Divide the dough into small balls, about 1-inch in diameter.
4. Heat oil in a deep frying pan over medium heat.
5. When the oil is hot, add the fritter balls and fry until golden brown.
6. Remove the fritters from the oil and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
8. Optional: garnish with additional pungent or goey for added flavor and texture.
